signals.headline: CPAC Straw Poll Names JD Vance Top Republican Presidential Nominee for 2028 | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
CPAC Straw Poll Names JD Vance Top Republican Presidential Nominee for 2028 | YES | MED confidence**

CPAC members voted J.D. Vance as the Republican presidential nominee in a straw poll, with 53% of 1,600 participants selecting him ahead of Marco Rubio (35%), signaling conservative base support for his 2028 bid despite an 8% dip from last year.[1]
